query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A young woman poses outdoors at twilight with her left hand on her hip, wearing a dark denim sleeveless dress over a bright green top. Her brown hair is pulled back with fine strands illuminated around her face. The background shows a gradient sky transitioning from deep blue at the top to lavender and pale pink near the horizon, with scattered clouds. A tall light pole with multiple fixtures stands behind her right shoulder, and a smaller light structure is visible in the distance to the left. Dark silhouettes of trees appear at the bottom right corner of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A young woman poses outdoors at twilight with her left hand on her hip, wearing a dark denim sleeveless dress over a bright green top, illuminated by harsh direct flash that creates bright specular highlights along her arm and shoulder while flattening the features of her face against the dim background. Her brown hair is pulled back with fine strands catching light around her face. The background shows a gradient sky transitioning from deep blue at the top to lavender and pale pink near the horizon, with scattered clouds. A tall light pole with multiple fixtures stands behind her right shoulder, and a smaller light structure is visible in the distance to the left. Dark silhouettes of trees appear at the bottom right corner of the frame. The unflattering frontal flash evokes a casual documentary snapshot aesthetic.
